emails.subject: Power Confirms
emails.body: Power Confirms Susan, Attached above are the reports for each counterparty with all deals from 11/1/01 on out. I am working on printing the confirms from Livelink. Thanks, Kerri

emails.subject: RE: Power Confirms
emails.body: RE: Power Confirms Susan, I have all of the confirms printed out from livelink except for 4 confirms with PSCO. The file room is still trying to locate them. Let me know if you would like the other confirms until those deals can be located. Thanks, Kerri To: Bailey, Susan

emails.subject: RE: Power Confirms
emails.body: Kerri, Please deliver what you have, so we can start with those. My location is ECN 3803A. Thanks, Susan To: Bailey, Susan
